domain: Career assistance, AI coaching, Women returning to workforce
archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections. Ensure cards have internal padding of p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl and rounded-3xl for a soft, friendly, and approachable feel.

grids.dashboard: Use 'MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM' but soft. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Avoid heavy borders.
grids.marketing: Use 'MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID' for feature highlights. Asymmetrical, gap-8.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[1px] with increased shadow. Cards slightly lift on hover.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up slightly using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Use pulse animations or playful skeleton loaders. AI processing needs a distinct 'thinking' state (e.g., pulsing border or glowing text in Soft Purple, with supportive microcopy like 'Analyzing your amazing experience...').

component_guidelines.buttons: Fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary actions. Use Soft Purple for primary CTA, Teal for success/completion. Warm Peach for secondary/supportive actions.
component_guidelines.cards: White background, rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl, 1px border of very light gray (#E5E7EB) or border-transparent, soft shadow.
component_guidelines.inputs: rounded-xl, bg-white, border border-gray-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-400 focus:border-transparent.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md). Logo on left, nav links centered, CTA on right.
component_guidelines.steppers: Use visual progress indicators with soft connecting lines. Active step in Soft Purple, completed in Teal.

hero_abstract_background.description: Abstract 3D soft geometric shapes in pastel purple, peach, and teal.
hero_abstract_background.placement: Landing page hero section right side or as a background graphic.

career_growth_concept.description: Minimalist clean career growth concept 3D staircase.
career_growth_concept.placement: Feature section for 'Skill Gap Analyzer' or 'Career Break Reframed'.

gradient_texture_bg.placement: Background for AI Chat Assistant, or the Interview Coach section to feel calming.

landing_page.styling: Use asymmetrical bento grid for features. Hero needs bold Outfit font and the hero_abstract_background image.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation or top nav with progress tracker. Quick action cards (Upload Resume, Analyze Skills, Practice Interview).
dashboard.styling: Clean white cards on #F9FAFB background. Personalize greeting ('Welcome back, Sarah. You're doing great').

resume_enhancement.styling: Use two-column layout: Input/Upload on left, AI generated reframed resume on right. Teal highlights for added skills.

skill_gap_analyzer.styling: Use progress bars and badging for skills. Soft Purple for learning path steps.

interview_coach.styling: Conversational UI. Highlight feedback with Warm Peach for empathy, Teal for actionable tips.

ai_chat_assistant.styling: Use the gradient_texture_bg for the chat interface to feel calming. Bubbles should be rounded-2xl.

career_break_story_generator.styling: Step-by-step wizard. Very supportive microcopy. Use Framer Motion for smooth transitions between questions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind CSS with the provided color palette in tailwind.config.js.
Install and setup Google Fonts: 'Outfit' for headings, 'DM Sans' for body.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons, stick to soft, modern icons.
Implement Shadcn UI but heavily override default border-radius to 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-3xl' and use the specified soft shadows to avoid the generic 'Vercel-look'.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute for testing (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button').
Use framer-motion for all major transitions, step-by-step wizards, and loading states.
Avoid harsh black borders; use soft gray or colored borders (e.g., border-gray-100 or border-purple-100).
Use 'react-dropzone' for file uploads on the resume page.
Ensure 'recharts' is used if any skill progression charts are built.
DO NOT use placeholder text or dummy images. ONLY use the URLs provided in the media section.
Apply 'glassmorphism' styles to sticky headers and AI floating assistant (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70).
Write highly empathetic, human-centered microcopy in loading states and empty states (e.g., 'You've got this!', 'Translating your life skills to professional superpowers...').
